name: Totango
description: Monitor Totango customer success platform for account health and team access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Totango at https://app.totango.com
2. Go to Settings → Integrations
3. Copy your Service ID (App Token)
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Service ID (App Token)
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Totango Settings → Integrations → Service ID (also called App Token)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Totango users with access to customer success data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Totango customer success platform is active
